title: Track stock sentiment, ticker attention, and market narratives
author: syndr0m1412
selftext:
**Sentimentick** helps traders, analysts, and bot builders track stock sentiment, ticker attention, and market narratives in one place.

Use it to monitor:

* Trending tickers
* Bullish and bearish sentiment shifts
* Narrative changes around stocks
* Market attention before and after catalysts
* Sentiment data for research, alerts, and trading workflows

Sentimentick is not financial advice and does not provide buy/sell recommendations.

Website: [**https://www.sentimentick.com**](https://www.sentimentick.com)
